report.summary: Cycle-close v10: No new commits since e3f63fc (Apr 2). Uncommitted files grew from 49 to 80 — 6 modified learn pages and 19 new published slugs staged but uncommitted. TS errors dropped from 141 (4 files) to 25 (1 file — examples-only). All 12 newly published pages verified with matching page.tsx. All 6 API routes structurally healthy; defi-yields remains most fragile.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 6 modified learn pages verified: crypto-staking, flash-loans, shared-sequencing, stablecoin-payments, wrapped-bitcoin, crypto-portfolio-rebalancing — all export metadata correctly, no 'use client' conflicts
5 of 6 modified learn pages have JSON-LD structured data; flash-loans-defi-guide-2026 is MISSING JSON-LD — action needed
StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx: clean — 'use client' directive correct, no metadata export conflict
12 newly published pages (exchanges, crypto-cards, crypto-loans, defi-lending, 2 learn guides) all have matching page.tsx files — no orphan slugs in new batch
TS errors reduced from 141 across 4 files → 25 errors in 1 file (structured-data.examples.ts only — non-code reference, non-blocking)
3 previously errored learn pages (crypto-arbitrage, lido-v3, rwa-yield) appear fixed in uncommitted changes
Full build verification blocked by sandbox OOM (expected for 1,246-page site)

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files present and structurally sound — no code changes since last cycle
/api/prices: HEALTHY — 60s TTL, in-memory cache, X-Cache-Source headers, stale fallback, no FALLBACK_DATA
/api/trending: HEALTHY — 300s TTL, in-memory cache, stale fallback, no X-Cache-Source headers
/api/fear-greed: HEALTHY — 600s TTL, in-memory cache, stale fallback, no X-Cache-Source headers
/api/market-metrics: HEALTHY — 60s TTL, in-memory cache, hardcoded mock FALLBACK_DATA, X-Cache headers
/api/market-dominance: HEALTHY — 300s TTL, in-memory cache, hardcoded FALLBACK_DATA, X-Cache-Source headers — most resilient route
/api/defi-yields: WARNING — no in-memory cache (Cache-Control header only), no FALLBACK_DATA, no X-Cache-Source — most fragile route
0 of 6 routes have rate limiting applied — all rely on Vercel's default limits
Live endpoint testing not possible from sandbox (network restricted)

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: e3f63fc (Apr 2 13:24 CEST) — no new deploys this cycle
80 uncommitted files (up from 49 last cycle): 11 modified tracked + 69 untracked
Modified tracked files include: published-pages.ts (19 new slugs), 6 learn pages, StablecoinYieldTracker.tsx, notifications-feed.json, package-lock.json
Untracked includes: 45+ report files, 4 social card SVGs, audit artifacts, 2 OG images
Build config stable: output=standalone, ignoreBuildErrors=true, staticGenerationMaxConcurrency=4
Vercel CLI not available in sandbox — deployment status unverifiable from here
RECOMMENDATION: Batch commit urgently — 80 uncommitted files is high drift risk

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle: 0 new commits. Accumulated uncommitted work continues growing (49 → 80 files)
19 new pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES (uncommitted): 4 exchange reviews, 2 crypto cards, 3 crypto loans, 1 defi lending, 2 learn guides
2 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE deferred (missing page.tsx): impermanent-loss guide, hyperliquid-perp-dex guide
IMPROVEMENT: TS errors dropped from 141 → 25 (3 learn page fixes in uncommitted changes)

Carry-over: (1) Commit + deploy accumulated work (URGENT — 80 files), (2) Add JSON-LD to flash-loans guide, (3) Add FALLBACK_DATA + in-memory cache to defi-yields route, (4) Add rate limiting to API routes, (5) Scaffold 2 deferred learn guides
Blockers: None critical, but uncommitted file count (80) is a growing operational risk
